analysis: The project is a website focused on black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the website. The CSS file is incomplete and needs to be updated with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file needs to be completed with all sections properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with improved mobile menu toggle functionality and proper event handling.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Update the JavaScript file with improved mobile menu toggle functionality, proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions. Ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality.
